pilot_signal_strength.evidence: Cross-domain absorption 0-6.6%, all below 10% target. Controls broken: shuffled=59.6% on first-letter (expected ~0%). Net signal vs shuffled is NEGATIVE in all domains.

hypothesis_survival.evidence: H1: BORDERLINE FALSIFIED (rates < 10%). H3: FALSIFIED (rho=-0.10, threshold 0.3). H6: FALSIFIED (p=0.25, d=0.33). H4: technically met. H5: mixed.

path_to_full_result.evidence: Broken controls undermine measurement validity. Unsupervised pipeline completely failed. 3/6 hypotheses falsified.

novelty.evidence: Novelty 7/10 from report. Cross-domain is genuinely novel. But unsupervised detection (core novelty) failed completely.

resource_efficiency.evidence: All experiments completed efficiently, ~3 hours total on single A100.

pilot_signal_strength.evidence: Confound decomposition (96.9% hierarchy-driven) and threshold sensitivity data are solid.

hypothesis_survival.evidence: H_alt1 FALSIFIED (96.9% hierarchy-driven > 50%). H_alt2 and H_alt3 untested but feasible.

path_to_full_result.evidence: Chanin et al. (2025) partially anticipates decomposition. Causal patching angle remains novel.

novelty.evidence: Novelty 6/10. Reduced by Chanin hedging paper.

resource_efficiency.evidence: Would require activation patching experiments not yet started.

pilot_signal_strength.evidence: No pilot data. Crowded theoretical landscape.

hypothesis_survival.evidence: Cui et al. 2025, Tang et al. 2025 provide competing results.

resource_efficiency.evidence: Low compute cost but high intellectual effort.

pilot_signal_strength.evidence: CMI FAILED to discriminate absorbed vs non-absorbed (p=0.25, d=0.33).

hypothesis_survival.evidence: H_sr1 FALSIFIED. Markov chain violation shows no significant difference.

path_to_full_result.evidence: No path without discriminative CMI signal.

novelty.evidence: Novelty 8/10 (highest). But negative empirical result eliminates publishability.

H1_cross_domain.evidence: City-country 0%, animal-class 1.4%, city-continent 6.5%, city-language 6.6%. All below 10% target. However, controls are broken (shuffled > signal in most domains), so even these low rates may not be trustworthy.

H2_predictors.evidence: Cannot compute meaningful correlations because absorption rates are near-zero and controls are broken.

H3_unsupervised.evidence: Best rho = -0.10, AUROC = 0.47. No component achieves rho > 0.3. ITAC does not separate candidates from random pairs.

H4_confound.evidence: 2/4 metrics retain |partial_r| > 0.2. L0 partial r = -0.494 (FDR-significant). But quality proxies are degenerate (float16 overflow noted).

H5_scaling.evidence: OLS interaction p = 1.2e-6 (significant). GAM interaction p = 1.0 (not significant). L0 correlation significant at layer 12 only.

H6_successive_refinement.evidence: Mann-Whitney p = 0.25. Cohen's d = 0.33. Spearman rho (CMI vs absorption) = 0.14 (p = 0.51).

critical_issues.issue: Shuffled label control produces 59.6% absorption on first-letter (expected ~0%)
critical_issues.implication: The absorption metric is not well-calibrated for Gemma 2 2B / Gemma Scope. Net signal vs shuffled is NEGATIVE in all domains.
critical_issues.recommended_action: Diagnose root cause before any further absorption measurement.

critical_issues.implication: Base rate of false positive absorption detection is non-trivial.

critical_issues.issue: Only 4/25 letters pass F1 > 0.85 probe gate on first-letter
critical_issues.implication: Probe quality is systematically inadequate. The 0.85 gate that the proposal pre-specified as mandatory fails for 84% of letters.

critical_issues.issue: Unsupervised pipeline produces negative/near-zero correlation with gold standard
critical_issues.implication: The core methodological novelty (conditional cosine + firing rate + ITAC) does not work.

reasons: 3/6 primary hypotheses falsified by full experiment results (H3, H6, and H1 borderline)
Controls are broken in every domain: shuffled label control = 59.6% on first-letter, net signal vs shuffled is NEGATIVE
Only 4/25 letters pass the pre-specified F1 > 0.85 probe quality gate
Unsupervised detection pipeline completely failed (rho = -0.10, AUROC = 0.47)
Successive refinement CMI does not discriminate absorbed from non-absorbed features (p = 0.25)
No candidate achieves weighted score >= 2.5 (REFINE threshold)
next_actions: Diagnose why shuffled label control produces 59.6% absorption -- possible implementation bug or metric calibration issue
If control bug is found and fixable: re-run pilot on first-letter only, then reassess ADVANCE decision
If controls are inherently broken on Gemma 2 2B: pivot to cand_decomposition_reframing with activation patching focus
Consider framing accumulated evidence as negative result paper about absorption measurement methodology
Preserve all experiment artifacts -- negative results are themselves publishable with proper framing

modifications: Focus on activation patching / causal test (novel angle not anticipated by Chanin et al. 2025)
Use negative unsupervised detection result as evidence that absorption is harder to detect than assumed
Investigate WHY controls are broken -- this could be a contribution itself
Consider negative result paper combining all 6 iterations of evidence
pivot_recommendation.alternative: Negative result / methodology critique paper documenting systematic failures of absorption measurement generalization
